allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add socket stability improvements and read\(buffer\) API

- Add atomic closed state tracking in ByteBufferClientSocket to prevent
  race conditions during socket close
- Add isClosed checks before read/write operations to fail fast with
  clear SocketClosedException instead of undefined behavior
- Handle AsynchronousCloseException gracefully when coroutine is already
  cancelled, avoiding spurious exception propagation
- Add read\(buffer: WriteBuffer, timeout\) method to Reader interface to
  allow callers to provide their own buffer, enabling buffer pooling
- Add efficient JVM override in AsyncBaseClientSocket that avoids
  buffer copying

These changes improve stability during concurrent socket operations
and reduce memory pressure by allowing buffer reuse.
EOF
\)")
